mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.name, f.cuisine, f.store_name, f.rating, f.heat, f.destination_id, COALESCE(d.id, s.spot_id) AS destination_ref_id, COALESCE(d.name, s.name) AS destination_name, COALESCE(d.scene_type, s.category) AS destination_scene_type, COALESCE(d.category, s.category) AS destination_category, COALESCE(d.heat, s.hotness) AS destination_heat, COALESCE(d.rating, s.rating) AS destination_rating, d.description AS destination_description, COALESCE(d.latitude, nc.latitude) AS destination_latitude, COALESCE(d.longitude, nc.longitude) AS destination_longitude FROM food f LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = f.destination_id LEFT JOIN spots s ON s.spot_id = f.destination_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT spot_name, AVG(y) AS latitude, AVG(x) AS longitude FROM nodes WHERE y IS NOT NULL AND x IS NOT NULL GROUP BY spot_name ) nc ON nc.spot_name = s.name

SELECT f.id, f.name, f.cuisine, f.store_name, f.rating, f.heat, f.destination_id, COALESCE(d.id, s.spot_id) AS destination_ref_id, COALESCE(d.name, s.name) AS destination_name, COALESCE(d.scene_type, s.category) AS destination_scene_type, COALESCE(d.category, s.category) AS destination_category, COALESCE(d.heat, s.hotness) AS destination_heat, COALESCE(d.rating, s.rating) AS destination_rating, d.description AS destination_description, COALESCE(d.latitude, nc.latitude) AS destination_latitude, COALESCE(d.longitude, nc.longitude) AS destination_longitude FROM food f LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = f.destination_id LEFT JOIN spots s ON s.spot_id = f.destination_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT spot_name, AVG(y) AS latitude, AVG(x) AS longitude FROM nodes WHERE y IS NOT NULL AND x IS NOT NULL GROUP BY spot_name ) nc ON nc.spot_name = s.name WHERE LOWER(f.name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(f.cuisine) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(f.store_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
SELECT DISTINCT cuisine FROM food WHERE cuisine IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cuisine) != '' ORDER BY cuisine
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO food (name, cuisine, store_name, rating, heat, destination_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{cuisine}, #{storeName}, #{rating}, #{heat}, #{destination.id})
mapper.update: UPDATE food SET name = #{name}, cuisine = #{cuisine}, store_name = #{storeName}, rating = #{rating}, heat = #{heat}, destination_id = #{destination.id} WHERE id = #{id}
